zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Rice於1668年6月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利時，她的父親Henry Rice48歲，母親Elizabeth Moore40歲。她於1692年與Deacon Samuel Wheelock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1756年4月6日享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Rice于1668年6月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利时，她的父亲Henry Rice48岁，母亲Elizabeth Moore40岁。她于1692年与Deacon Samuel Wheelock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1756年4月6日享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized pronunciation of one of the most common Welsh personal names, Rhys, from a form originally meaning ‘rash, impetuous’, also spelled Rys and Re(e)s. See also Reese , with which it is interchangeable as a result of different Anglicized forms of the Welsh vowel y, and also compare Preece and Price . Initial R- in Welsh is voiceless and often spelled Rh-, but in English R- is voiced as in the Anglicized surnames Rees and Rice. Welsh y is a short back vowel /ɪ/. In the medieval period the English approximation of this vowel was either /i/ or /e/, lengthened to /i:/ and /e:/. Subsequent sound changes in English produced the alternative pronunciations represented in Rees, Preece and Rice, Price. The name has also been established in Ireland from an early date.

English: either a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a thicket (Middle English ris, rice, ris, from Old English hrīs, Old Norse hrís), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place called with this word, such as Rise (East Yorkshire).

English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English Rys(e) and Re(e)s which when without a preposition could derive from one or other of several Old French and Middle English words, including Anglo-Norman French ris ‘laughter, smile’, Middle English ris, res ‘stem, stalk’, in origin the same word as in 2 above, and Middle English ris, rise, rice, res, Old French ris, riz ‘rice’, perhaps a nickname for a rice dealer or a cook.

variants.name: Reese
meanings: North German and Dutch (De Reese): nickname for a very big man, from Middle Low German, Middle Dutch rese ‘giant’.
German: habitational name from any of the places called Rees or Reese, in Rhineland and Lower Saxony.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

variants.name: Ryce
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Rice  .

variants.name: Rise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Aase, Lief, Sven.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of over twenty farmsteads named Rise, from Old Norse hrís ‘brushwood’. The name also occurs in Sweden and Denmark.

variants.name: Wrice
meanings: Probably Welsh or English: variant of   Rice  .

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Rice was born on 4 June 1668, in Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Henry Rice, was 48 and her mother, Elizabeth Moore, was 40. She married Deacon Samuel Wheelock in 1692, in Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 6 April 1756, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Rice est née le 4 juin 1668, à Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Rice, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Moore, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Deacon Samuel Wheelock en 1692, à Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 avril 1756, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lydia Rice am 4. Juni 1668 in Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Rice 48 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Moore 40. Sie hat 1692 in Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Deacon Samuel Wheelock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. April 1756 im Alter von 87 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Rice è nata il il 4 giugno 1668 nel Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Henry Rice, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Moore, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Deacon Samuel Wheelock nel 1692, nel Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1756, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Riceが1668年6月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックススドブリーで生まれた時，父Henry Riceは48歳，母Elizabeth Mooreは40歳であった。1692年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルルボロウでDeacon Samuel Wheelockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1756年4月6日に87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Rice(이)가 1668년 6월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Rice(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Moore(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1692년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 말를버루그h에서 Deacon Samuel Wheelock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1756년 4월 6일 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Rice nasceu em 4 de junho de 1668, em Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Rice, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Moore, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Deacon Samuel Wheelock em 1692, em Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de abril de 1756, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Rice родилась 4 июня 1668 г. в местности судбури, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Henry Rice было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Moore, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Deacon Samuel Wheelock в 1692 г. в местности марлбороую, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 6 апреля 1756 г. в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lydia Rice nació el 4 de junio de 1668, en Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Henry Rice, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Moore, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Deacon Samuel Wheelock en 1692, en Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1756, a la edad de 87 años.
